name: snarl-sopi-backend
description: Snarl & Sopi operator backend — v5.29: /sales now accepts the kiosk checkout envelope {saleId,at,totalIsk,lines} (normalised to canonical per-item records, stable per-line tradeNo from saleId, ISO/epoch timestamp), unblocking kiosk vend → stock decrement + revenue with no kiosk rebuild. Cumulative over v5.28.
